ddls:
CREATE TABLE "technologies" (
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technology */,
  "tech_name" TEXT /* Name of the technology */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the technology */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of technology (e.g., local, global) */,
  "implementation_cost" TEXT /* Estimated implementation cost */,
  "implementation_timeframe" TEXT /* Estimated timeframe for implementation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of technology development (e.g., research, testing, deployed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the industry */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the industry belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographic region of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutes" (
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research institution */,
  "institute_name" TEXT /* Name of the research institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the institution */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the institution (e.g., environmental science, engineering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academics" (
  "academic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic organization */,
  "academic_name" TEXT /* Name of the academic organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the organization */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the organization (e.g., environmental science, engineering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("academic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technology_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact assessment */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology being assessed */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry providing the assessment */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research institution providing the assessment */,
  "academic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic organization providing the assessment */,
  "total_impact" TEXT /* Overall impact assessment score */,
  "effectiveness_rating" TEXT /* Rating of technology effectiveness (1-5) */,
  "ease_of_implementation_rating" TEXT /* Rating of ease of implementation (1-5) */,
  "cost_effectiveness_rating" TEXT /* Rating of cost effectiveness (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technology_impact_academic_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_id") REFERENCES academics ("academic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technology_impact_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technology_impact_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_technology_impact_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, industry) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user with the permission */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view_data, edit_data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry in the collaboration */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research institution in the collaboration */,
  "academic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic organization in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_academic_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_id") REFERENCES academics ("academic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology in the report */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry in the report */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research institution in the report */,
  "academic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic organization in the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_academic_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_id") REFERENCES academics ("academic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology in the data visualization */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry in the data visualization */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research institution in the data visualization */,
  "academic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic organization in the data visualization */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the data visualization */,
  "visualization_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the data visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_academic_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_id") REFERENCES academics ("academic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_analysis" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend analysis */,
  "tech_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technology in the trend analysis */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the industry in the trend analysis */,
  "institute_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research institution in the trend analysis */,
  "academic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the academic organization in the trend analysis */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the trend analysis */,
  "trend_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the trend analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_analysis_academic_id FOREIGN KEY ("academic_id") REFERENCES academics ("academic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_analysis_institute_id FOREIGN KEY ("institute_id") REFERENCES institutes ("institute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_analysis_tech_id FOREIGN KEY ("tech_id") REFERENCES technologies ("tech_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_analysis_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)
